feedPosts.caption:
“Kya ye content koi dekhe ga?”

This thought was and still is the most dominant thought in my mind

The major reason I stayed away from social media was because the path I would choose, would be a lonely one. And honestly, it is

But over time I have found confidence in my abilities, to change the pattern. To bring forward what’s necessary. To enlighten people, to inspire them. 

None of this would be possible without the support of you people, and my family and friends. 

But I want to make one thing very clear. I will ruin social media. Peace

extractedComments.text: As per Hadith of Prophet(S.A.W) drawing sketching is haram

replies.text:
@eeshaahmad._ Islamic rulings on sketching are not one sided
Some hadiths warn against image making but scholars have differed in understanding and application
Many scholars explain that those hadiths were about idol worship and images made for reverence
Other scholars allow drawing for halal purposes when there is no worship no shirk and no immoral intention
So saying sketching is haram without context is incomplete
Half knowledge is more dangerous than no knowledge

5957 sahih bukhari 
Narrated `Aisha:
I purchased a cushion with pictures on it. The Prophet (came and) stood at the door but did not enter. I said (to him), "I repent to Allah for what (the guilt) I have done." He said, "What is this cushion?" I said, "It is for you to sit on and recline on." He said, "The makers of these pictures will be punished on the Day of Resurrection and it will be said to them, 'Make alive what you have created.' Moreover, the angels do not enter a house where there are pictures.'"

feedPosts.caption:
The video unveils the hidden truth behind the birth of the European Renaissance and the systematic rebranding of the Islamic Golden Age. For exactly 508 years, between 750 CE and 1258 CE, the Muslim world was the undisputed global leader in science, medicine, and philosophy. 

While Europe struggled through the Dark Ages, centers of learning like the House of Wisdom preserved and perfected the world’s knowledge. This video reveals the tactical translation movement in Toledo where the West stole Islamic science by Latinizing names to hide their true origins. We explore how legendary scholars like Ibn Sina were transformed into Avicenna and Al-Khwarizmi became Algoritmi to make modern people believe these contributions were Western. 

Discover how the Islamic Golden Age directly built the foundations of modern mathematics, optics, and chemistry only to be erased from history books. It is time to uncover this grand deception and reclaim the 1,000 years of progress that were hijacked and renamed. Join us as we acknowledge the true architects of modern civilization.

feedPosts.caption:
Clean water isn’t just a basic need, it’s the foundation for health, education, and opportunity.

Yet for millions in Pakistan and across the world, especially in remote and underserved areas, access to clean drinking water remains a daily struggle.

That’s where the P&G Purifier of Water sachet makes a profound difference. This powerful innovation works like a mini water treatment plant, removing dirt, bacteria, viruses, and parasites. In just 30 minutes, it turns contaminated water into clean drinking water.

At the core of this is the life changing P&G Children’s Safe Drinking Water (CSDW) Program, a global initiative that has been transforming lives since 2004.

In Pakistan, a partnership with The Hope Foundation, the program has delivered over 1 billion liters of clean drinking water! Globally, the journey continues with a goal to reach 25 billion liters by 2025.

The need is still urgent. More than 2 billion people around the world live without reliable access to clean water. Through efforts like the CSDW Program, children stay in school, women reclaim their time and potential, and communities are restored with hope.

Donate at :https://www.hopecharityusa.org/donate-today

#PowerofCleanWater #PGPartner #CSDW #PakistanHope #HopeFoundation#

Thank you for raising this important topic!

That's not correct at all. As psychologist, we see problems from bio, psycho, social and spiritual perspective. In addition, which you're talking is one of school of psychology (psychodynamic) theory. In short, don't rely on influencers data entirely ..consult professional about misconceptions.

I honestly appreciate your courage, @ziazulfii . Most people stay silent, but you chose to speak up  and that's exactly what makes a difference. The moment someone dares to talk about reality, the so-called "psychologists" jump in to criticize, just to protect their fake image. But influencers like you spread awareness, and that's what scares them  because you're exposing their truth and shutting down their game.

Antidepressants aren't good choice as well.  Therapy is costly as well.  I don't know why most of the GP see a patient and instead of solving medical issues they suggested to see a psychiatrist and psychologist. Like have you check that patient for vitals? Sorry to say but if "elaj na Karna aye to patient to mental issue bol Kar psychiatrist suggest Karna is pathetic practice. Suppose Apne patient KO antidepressants per daal Bhi DIA Kia Uske surrounding or circumstances Bhi thek hojayenge? I'm totally against antidepressants. For some extent you could give patients anti-anxiety medication for limited period of time and lifestyle changes can make a great difference.  I've seen many post of people talking about trauma toxicity, manipulation but haven't seen any solution videos regarding it. Why digging and making people uncomfortable instead of solving issues. Everyone is  busy in selling their MANJAN. whoever is reading this comment please make sure that no-one gonna come and safe you. You need to stand for yourself take care of your health. Meal diet. No matter how rich or average family you came from. Make healthy choices within your budget. Keep your surroundings short and clean. Avoid people who are harmful for your mental health. Even if they are from your family. Maintain distance. Keep yourself busy even by doing little house chores. Or whatever makes you feel happy.

feedPosts.caption:

feedPosts.caption: The Sanctuary of Truth in Pattaya is a hand-carved wooden structure that began construction in 1981, initiated by Thai businessman Lek Viriyaphant. It’s made entirely of teak wood without any metal nails. The vision behind it was to create a place that reflects Eastern philosophy, religious truths, and the value of traditional craftsmanship. Although still not fully complete, the sanctuary blends influences from Thai, Hindu, Buddhist, Chinese, and Khmer traditions. It stands as a symbol that human civilization is deeply connected to spiritual and cultural values beyond materialism.

MENTAL DISORDER IS NOT A FASHION ⬇️

(Idea credits: @eemaanasif) 🫡🧠

Often times I have seen these huge celebrities labelling certain disorders like PCOS, OCD, ADHD, etc onto themselves without ANY basis or proper diagnosis. The reason is understandable. More talking points in media and PR. They have made a trend out of mental illnesses. 

ADHD is a serious problem. Those who have it especially children it is very evident from observation. Manifestations in adults is different. There are different types. Attention Deficit type. Hyperactive type. or Mixed. 

Lastly, stop labelling disorders onto yourself. It can only be concluded with proper diagnosis and analysis of symptoms

Schizophrenia is a complex mental health disorder where people experience a different reality than others. It can make someone see, hear, or feel things that aren’t actually there, or believe things that don’t make sense to others. These experiences can be confusing and overwhelming, as the line between real and imagined becomes blurred.

There are different types of schizophrenia that affect people in various ways:

Paranoid Schizophrenia – This is the most common type, where people have strong beliefs that others are plotting against them or want to harm them, along with hearing voices.

Disorganized Schizophrenia – Here, a person’s thoughts and speech become jumbled, making it hard for them to communicate clearly. Their behavior may also become unpredictable.

Catatonic Schizophrenia – In this rare form, a person might stop moving or speaking for long periods or, in contrast, may move in unusual ways.

Undifferentiated Schizophrenia – This type includes symptoms from multiple forms, making it hard to categorize under just one type.

Schizophrenia is more than just hearing voices or having strange thoughts—it’s a lifelong condition that requires understanding and support. With the right help, people living with schizophrenia can still lead meaningful lives.

Here are 5 reasons you feel depressed all the time:

HIGH SUGAR INTAKE:
Bad news for 'Meetha' lovers. Overconsumption of sugar triggers imbalances in certain brain chemicals, especially when consumed in high amounts in the morning. These imbalances can lead to depression and may even increase the long-term risk of developing a mental health disorder in some people.

POOR SLEEPING ROUTINE:
Scrolling through reels late at night won't do you any good. Poor sleep may create difficulties regulating emotions that, in turn, may leave you more vulnerable to depression in the future — months or even years from now. And depression itself is associated with sleep difficulties such as shortening the amount of restorative slow wave sleep a person gets each night. 

PHYSICAL INACTIVITY:
This is the real pandemic. By not moving your body, you're limiting the oxygen supply to your brain and also preventing the natural release of Endorphins which are feel good chemicals of your body. Exercising keeps the brain active and is also correlated to having better sleep. 

SOCIAL ISOLATION:
Humans are social animals and we are meant to socialise and interact with others. And no! I'm not talking about social media. We must take our time out to interact with friends and family, to share our lives with others. Social disconnection leads to not only depression but also heart problems and reduced life expectancy. 

SMOKING: 
Smoking will give you a temporary feeling of sedation but will ultimately make you depressed in the long term. Smoking is a behavior that increases the risk of depression. The higher the smoking frequency and smoking volume, the higher the risk of depression, whereas smoking cessation is associated with decreased risk of depression, and the longer the smoking cessation duration, the lower the risk of depression.

OVERCOME MISSING TILE SYNDROME 👇

We are all human beings who can never be perfect. Every person has shortcomings, but his attitude towards life determines how he sees those flaws and how to overcome them or not to dominate them. And this thinking can be strengthened only if we take care of these things;

 

Covetousness

Greed is something that has no end. It starts to grow even more with time if it is not allowed to dominate itself at the right time. The desire to get something is a different thing, but the desire to get everything can never let you be satisfied.

 

Think positive

Whenever your focus is on negative things or shortcomings, instead of feeling sad about it, think about how you can get better but never compare yourself with others for it. Nothing can ever be perfect, so make shortcomings strong. Always think about how you can be happy with what you have. Try but not compare.

 

Contentment

Satisfaction is the most positive state of mind. It also makes us feel great happiness in every small moment of life. An unhappy person remains unhappy and tense even after great achievements, whereas a satisfied man is happy in every small achievement.

Satisfaction does not mean that you should not improve yourself. This means that you should be happy in what you have got after trying and should move forward positively for better results.

The issue surrounding modernization and Instant Gratification. The problem of wanting what we want, right NOW. Let's discuss.

Procrastination is the act of delaying or postponing chores or activities. It is a widespread issue with which a lot of individuals contend, and it can have a detrimental impact on both personal and professional life. When we delay critical chores and responsibilities, we frequently do so in favor of what is more pleasurable or convenient at the time. As a result, there may be decreased performance and productivity as well as emotions of guilt, worry, and anxiety. It's critical to pinpoint the root causes of procrastination and create management and coping mechanisms for the tendency to put things off. This could entail making plans, setting objectives, and using tools for accountability like calendars or to-do lists. By making an effort to avoid procrastination, we can increase our output, lessen stress, and accomplish our objectives.
.
.
.
.
#procrastination #procrastinating #procrastinationtips #procrastinationatitsfinest #psychologytips #psychologytipsforlife

A Day in the life of a Depressed Person 

Depression is the leading cause of disability worldwide. It is an increasingly growing mental disorder especially among the youth, for a variety of reasons. 

This video is a dedication to all those suffering from depression and I hope, with this film, people can relate to it and find comfort in knowing they are not alone. I invite comments from all of you who are suffering or have suffered from depression. Feel free to share your story :) 

Filmed by 🎥: @muneeb_bhai_official
